content.en:
"Fortunately, I went to copy the body, if the body went to find the robber, I would definitely die!"

Ye Tian said happily.

Other invincible people don't have a copy body like him, so they can only enter other exotic worlds to find robber beasts with their real bodies, and once they are unlucky enough to encounter a more powerful robber beast, they have no time to escape.

For example, the beast just now was much stronger than Ye Tian's, and a look fixed on Ye Tian's body, making him unable to move.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, the strength of this beast was at least comparable to that of a third-rank invincible ancestor, and with the strength of his sixth-rank invincible ancestor, it was simply like an ant.

"Yuan Demon Heaven and Earth can only give up!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He re-chose an exotic world, anyway, if he copied the body and fell, he would only lose some resources, which was nothing, if he was lucky and encountered a relatively weak beast, such as a beast below the ten tribulation beasts, he had a certain hope of killing it.

As an invincible ancestor, Ye Tian could easily enter one foreign world after another, without worrying about being wiped out by the rules of the foreign land.

Each exotic world is connected to many exotic worlds, and countless exotic worlds are connected together, turning into a network of exotic worlds.

Therefore, in a very short period of time, he can find a lot of exotic worlds, and he also knows what period these exotic worlds will be in, and once these exotic worlds enter the period of the Great Tribulation, he will enter these exotic worlds to look for the tribulation beasts.

Basically, every short period of time, an exotic world would enter the Great Tribulation period, and Ye Tian would act.

I have to say that weak rank beasts are still very rare, like the birth of a Tribulation Tribulation Beast in the Dark Forbidden Domain, it is almost an extremely rare thing, and it is precisely because of the incomparable rarity that the strongest of the six super-famous forces will target this Tribulation Beast.

But the invincibles didn't look down on a single robbery beast, so they didn't come to the dark forbidden realm to hunt the robbery beast.

The robbers experienced too few catastrophes, not only was their strength weak, but the blood they contained did not have much catastrophe power, so they naturally did not help the invincible much.

Ye Tian tried again and again, and encountered powerful beasts again and again, basically encountering more than 1,000 tribulation beasts, and occasionally encountering more than 10,000 tribulation beasts.

Of course, there was also a time when he encountered a tribulation beast of more than a hundred tribulations, but he was still far from being an opponent, and the opponent was at least comparable to the top fifth-rank invincible ancestor combat power, and he could easily be severely injured.

There are also a few exotic worlds that do not even have robbed beasts, obviously because the robbers have been hunted, and they have not experienced new robbers, so no new robbers are born.

He found that there were many doors in these exotic worlds, and there were even several second-order gates, obviously these forces were staring at these special exotic worlds, and when it entered the new tribulation yuan and gave birth to a new tribulation beast, they would attack this new tribulation beast.

Before you know it, the Dark Forbidden Realm has passed through six dark calendars, and only three dark calendars are left to usher in a catastrophe.

He was no longer worried about the catastrophe in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but continued to search for the robbery beast.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian found a robber beast that was not strong.

The strength of a thirty-seven tribulation beast is only equivalent to that of a sixth-rank invincible ancestor, but it is comparable to the top sixth-rank invincible ancestor, and not much weaker than a fifth-rank invincible ancestor.

Ye Tian was naturally not his opponent, but he left easily.

The robbery beast of the thirty-seven tribulations, such a robbery beast is very rare, and its strength is naturally very weak, and it is expected to be hunted.

However, he could not hunt it alone.

Even if the main body, the copy body, and the invincible ancestor clone shot together, they couldn't hunt a thirty-seven tribulation beast.

"I can only find someone to cooperate!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Dark Forbidden Domain now has only two forbidden places for super-name-level forces, namely the Firmament Sword Tomb and the Calamity Black Mountain.

As for the other four super-name-level forces, they had already destroyed the second-order gate, although Ye Tian also knew which exotic world their headquarters were, but he didn't want to go to them.

The more invincibles you work with, the less you gain.

Therefore, he was only prepared to cooperate with the Firmament Sword Tomb and the Calamity Black Mountain, these two forces were strong enough to cooperate with them to have any hope of slaying the beast.

If you cooperate with the other four super-name forces, it is very likely that you will not be able to deal with that beast.

------------

The Dark Forbidden Realm, the Forbidden Land of the Firmament Sword Tomb.

Ye Tian came here and directly asked the strongest people guarding the Firmament Sword Tomb to contact their invincibles.

Soon, an invincible man from the Firmament Sword Tomb descended here.

When this invincible person arrived, he was extremely surprised to see that Ye Tian had reached the realm of the invincible ancestor.

"I didn't expect that not long after the birth of your Dark Forbidden Domain, an invincible ancestor was born, and it was a very short time to achieve an invincible ancestor, it's really unexpected!" said the Invincible of the Firmament Sword Tomb, the Mortal Ruins Sword Ancestor.

"It's just luck!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Ruin Sword Ancestor said again: "Since your Dark Forbidden Domain has given birth to an invincible, our Firmament Sword Tomb will naturally give face, so this second-order gate will be removed." "

He thought that Ye Tian's purpose was like this, so he said it in advance.

However, Ye Tian shook his head and said, "Ruins Sword Ancestor, the purpose of my coming to you is not this, but I want to cooperate with your Firmament Sword Tomb to kill a robbery beast!"

"Kill the robber beast?" The Ruins Sword Ancestor was slightly startled: "The robber beasts are very powerful, many robber beasts are even comparable to fourth-class, third-class or even second-class invincibles, we don't dare to look for robber beasts, more than ninety percent of the probability will be killed directly by the robber beasts." "

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Ruins Sword Ancestor, I have the strength of the beast robbery intelligence, this time I am dealing with a thirty-seven tribulation beast, I am not an opponent, I don't know if you are interested in the Sky Sword Tomb?"

"Thirty-Seven Tribulations?"

The Mortal Ruins Sword Ancestor became interested.

Although the beasts of this level were very powerful, infinitely close to the fifth-rank invincible, they at least had the hope of being killed.

"I, our Firmament Sword Tomb has agreed!" the Ruin Sword Ancestor agreed.

"I will also work with the Disaster Herenegro. Ye Tian added.

"No problem!" the Ruin Sword Ancestor nodded, "The leader of our Firmament Sword Tomb is in an eternal heaven and earth, and it is impossible to contact him for a while, and if he cooperates with Calamity Black Mountain, he will have a greater certainty of killing that beast." But are you sure your intelligence is correct?"

"Naturally correct, I went there in person, can I have a vacation? When the time comes, I will strike first, you can follow behind, if the information is wrong, you can withdraw as soon as possible!" Ye Tian promised.

"Then I'm fine!"

Ruins Sword Ancestor Dao.

Subsequently, Ye Tian contacted Calamity Montenegro and chatted with the invincible people of Calamity Montenegro, and the other party was also willing to make a move.

After all, the value of the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Tribulation Beasts far exceeded that of the One Tribulation Tribulation Beast, and even for the invincible, it was still of great value.

Ye Tian chose a day and united the eight invincibles of the two super-famous forces of the Firmament Sword Tomb and the Calamity Black Mountain, plus Ye Tian dispatched the two invincible combat forces of the copy body and the invincible ancestor clone, which is equivalent to a total of ten invincibles.
